title: 6 Logging in to FX Notes
body_text:
6	Logging in to FX Notes
6.1	Overview of Logging in to FX Notes
To access FX Notes, the individual must be set up on the Client Centre (either as a CPS Admin Security Officer or a Client Centre User) and must be assigned access to the FX Notes application. See Chapter 5, FX Notes User Management.
6.2	Logging in to FX Notes
To log in to FX Notes:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	Youâll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itâs your first login to the Client Centre, youâve deleted your cookies, or youâre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications.
See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
FX Notes
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youâve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under âMy Favouritesâ.
Figure 3: Accessing FX Notes
Caution
:	Always log off and close the browser when you step away from your desk or when you are finished using the system.
END
